name: nebius-cookbook
description: Production-grade recipes for building AI agents on Nebius AgentKit.

scripts.build: bun run build:content && cd app && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 bun run build
scripts.build:deploy: NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 bun run build && bun run scripts/prepare-standalone.ts
scripts.build:content: bun run build:recipes && bun run build:blueprints
scripts.validate: bun run scripts/validate-recipes.ts && bun run scripts/validate-blueprints.ts
scripts.check: bun run validate && bun run build:readme --check
